arts.ttl: Big Data gives Real Madrid little chance of success
arts.sum: These predictions align with those made before the round of 16, indicating that both Real Madrid and Bayern Munich are expected to be eliminated in the quarter-finals. Following a round in which four teams that had to compete in the play-offs— Real Madrid, Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund, and PSG —secured qualification, the predictor has reassessed the situation.

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s penalty shootout win vs Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Mbappe and Vinicius have not looked good in a single game against Atletico Madrid this season, and you need them to do more. He won Real Madrid the penalty that Vinicius Jr skied, made a couple of sick challenges, but the player who is supposed to be the best in the world has to do more.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid tempt Chelsea with HUGE swap transfer for 'very interested' Fernandez
arts.sum: Real Madrid could offer Chelsea an intriguing swap deal for Enzo Fernandez this summer, who is said to be ‘very interested’ in a move to the Spanish giants. Real are aware that Fernandez will command a significant fee and TEAMtalk report that they could offer Aurelien Tchouameni has a makeweight in any deal, with Chelsea having long-admired the French international.
